_comment: User-facing config template. Coordinator generates this from task description in Phase 1. Fields prefixed with _ are documentation, omit from real config.

aco._comment: ACO algorithm hyperparameters - defaults are sane

task_space._comment: Define the search space. Use EITHER 'nodes' (explicit) OR 'auto_discover_from' (glob).

scoring._comment: How verified_score is computed. mode = script | llm | fallback
scoring._alt_script: script_path: '../my-scoring-rule.py' (file must define def score(ant_artifact) -> float)
scoring._alt_llm: rubric: 'custom scoring rubric text for scorer role'

ant_prompt._comment: What the ant actually tries to achieve. This is the bridge between task semantics and ACO mechanics.
ant_prompt.objective: Find the file with the highest density of suspicious code patterns
evidence_requirements: At least 1 file:line reference per node visited
Concrete code snippet showing the suspicious pattern
ant_prompt.tools_hint: Use Grep + Read for code-based exploration
